result.title: Canceling Subscriptions And Building AI Agents Instead
result.description:
There are tools I've been paying for monthly that I'm pretty sure I can just build myself with AI now. So that's what I'm doing.

I'm starting with my finance and bookkeeping workflow. Categorizing expenses, reading through invoices and receipts, keeping track of where money is going. Stuff I've either been doing manually or paying someone else to handle. The goal is to have an agent that does it automatically so I never have to think about it again.

And honestly the process of building it has already made me look at every other subscription I have and go. Wait, could I just build this too?

So I want to know - what's a workflow in your life or your work that you've been meaning to automate? Something you're paying for or just something that eats up way more time than it should. 

Drop it in the comments and let's actually build these things together. I'll be checking in 👇
